action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 9 crashed because auraloss.MultiResolutionSTFTLoss expects 3-D input [batch, ch, time] but we passed 2-D waveforms [batch, time]. The pretrained MetricGAN+ baseline scored PESQ 3.134. Analysis: We need to fix train.py by unsqueeze(1) before feeding to MR-STFT, then verify the training pipeline with a short smoke test. After that we can run a 1-epoch fine-tuning to measure epoch time and validation improvement. Decision: 1) Overwrite train.py with the dimension fix and robust logging. 2) Run a tiny inline test confirming MR-STFT works on 3-D tensors. 3) Run train.py --max_steps 5 as smoke test. 4) If it passes, run 1 epoch to measure time and validation PESQ.
action.command: python -c "import torch; from auraloss.freq import MultiResolutionSTFTLoss; l=MultiResolutionSTFTLoss(); x=torch.randn(2,1,16000); print('mrstft ok', l(x,x).item())" && python train.py --max_steps 5
